description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push. The workflow has two jobs: one for macOS and one for Linux. The macOS job runs on macos-11, sets up Python 3.7, installs packages and Python modules, downloads dependencies, and compiles the code. The Linux job runs on ubuntu-22.04 with a matrix strategy for different targets, installs dependencies, compiles the code, runs tests, and publishes coverage to Codecov.
